---
title: "Bayesian_Optimisation"
author: "Elizabet Sanyal"
date: "2023-06-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}

library(kerastuneR)
# Define dropout rate
dropout_rate <- 0.2
num_features <- 3720
val_window <- 50
training_window <- 60
l1_lambda <- 0.01  
window_data <- as.matrix(data_wide[1:training_window,])
window_returns <- as.matrix(returns[1:training_window,])
    
val_window_data <- as.matrix(data_wide[training_window:(training_window+val_window),])
val_returns <- as.matrix(returns[training_window:(training_window+val_window),])


num_features <- ncol(data_wide)


build_model <- function(hp) {
  
    layer <- hp$Choice('layer', c(1, 2))
    layer_1 <- layer_input(shape = c(num_features), 
                           name = "input_1")
    
    layer_linear <-  layer_1 %>% 
                           layer_dense(units = hp$Int('units_lin',
                                      min_value=1,
                                      max_value=512,
                                      step=32), 
                                       activation = "linear",
                                       kernel_initializer = initializer_random_normal(mean = 0.05, stddev = 0.05)) %>%
                           layer_dropout(rate = hp$Choice('rate',
                values=c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.5))) 


     layer_2 <- layer_input(shape = c(num_features), name = "input_2")
     
     layer_nonlinear <- layer_2 %>% layer_dense(units = hp$Int('units_nlin_i',
                                      min_value=1,
                                      max_value=512,
                                      step=32),                                                                                          activation = hp$Choice('activation_nl_i', c('tanh','swish', 'sigmoid')),
                                                kernel_initializer = initializer_random_normal(mean = 0.05, stddev = 0.05))  %>%
                         layer_dropout(rate = hp$Choice('rate',
                values=c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.5)))
     
     if (layer!=1) {
       
       layer_nonlinear <- layer_nonlinear %>%  layer_dense(units = hp$Int('units_nlin_ii',
                                      min_value=1,
                                      max_value=512,
                                      step=32),                                                                                          activation = hp$Choice('activation_nl_ii', c('tanh','swish', 'sigmoid')),
                                                kernel_initializer = initializer_random_normal(mean = 0.05, stddev = 0.05))
       
     }

      concat <- layer_concatenate(list(layer_linear, layer_nonlinear))
      layer_3 <- concat %>%
                    layer_dense(units = hp$Int('units_conc',
                                      min_value=1,
                                      max_value=512,
                                      step=32), 
                                activation = hp$Choice('activation_conc', c('tanh','swish', 'sigmoid')), 
                                kernel_initializer = initializer_random_normal(mean = 0.05, stddev = 0.05))

# Define the rest of the model
        output <- layer_3 %>%
                 layer_dense(units = length(stock_ids_short), 
                             activation = "linear",
                             kernel_initializer = initializer_random_normal(mean = 0.05, stddev = 0.05))  %>% 
          layer_lambda(my_activation) # full investment constrain

          model <- keras_model(inputs = list(layer_1, layer_2), outputs = output)

# Compile the model
           model %>% compile(
               loss = sharpe_ratio_loss,
               optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = hp$Choice('learning_rate',
                values=c(1e-2, 1e-3, 1e-4)))
                             )

  return(model)
 
}


tuner <- kerastuneR::RandomSearch(
    build_model,
    objective = 'val_loss',
    max_trials = 100,
    executions_per_trial = 1,
    directory = '~/R/ML_SR',
    project_name = 'B_opt_deep_portfolio')

tuner %>% fit_tuner(list(window_data, window_data),window_returns,
                    epochs = 15, 
                    validation_data = list(list(val_window_data, val_window_data),val_returns),  shuffle=FALSE)
```

```{r}
best_5_models  <- tuner %>% get_best_models(5)
best_5_models[[1]] 
```
```{r}
tuner %>%results_summary(10)
```
